channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Google Workspace Promo Code: Up to 14% Off in 2026
item.description: Boost your productivity and save with exclusive Google Workspace coupons from WIRED. Get up to 14% off plans for three months, including Starter, Standard, and Plus tiers.

item.title: 20% Off LG Promo Code & Coupons | April 2026
item.description: Save 20% with an LG promo code today, plus up to $1,000 off appliances, 40% off bestselling TVs and monitors.

item.title: NZXT Discount Codes: 50% Off in April 2026
item.description: Save 50%, plus up to $250 with NZXT promo codes and discounts.

item.title: 30% Off Canon Promo Codes | April 2026
item.description: Save an extra 10% or 30% with Canon coupon codes, plus up to $1,600 on cameras, printers, and more this April.

item.title: Vimeo Promo Codes and Deals: Save Up to 40%
item.description: Enjoy 25% off a membership, 40% off, plus an additional 10% off annual plans, and more deals to save at Vimeo.

item.title: Medicube Coupon Code: Top Promo Codes and Discounts for April 2026
item.description: Upgrade your K-beauty routine with these active Medicube promo codes. Save on Age-R devices, serums, and masks with student discounts and referral rewards.

item.title: Top Paramount+ Coupon Codes and Deals for April 2026
item.description: Save on streaming with the latest Paramount+ promo codes and deals, including 50% off subscriptions, free trials, and more.

item.title: TurboTax Service Codes: 30% Off TurboTax Full Service Expert | April 2026
item.description: Tax season doesn’t have to be stressful. Score 30% off full service expert on federal tax filings and more exclusive TurboTax discount codes on WIRED.

item.title: 10% Dell Coupon Codes | April 2026
item.description: Get 10% off with verified Dell promo code, plus today’s coupons for up to $600 off laptops, Alienware monitors, and all things tech.

item.title: Peacock Promo Codes: 40% Off April 2026
item.description: Stream your favorite shows for up to $80 off this month, and save on subscription plans with the latest Peacock TV coupons from WIRED.

item.title: NordVPN Coupons and Deals: 77% Off in April 2026
item.description: Save up to 77% on 2-year plans and get 3 free months with our NordVPN discount codes.

item.title: 20% Off Brooks Promo Code & Deals for | April 2026
item.description: Enjoy 20% off your first order with a Brooks coupon code, plus top discounts and deals on our favorite Brooks running shoes.

item.title: Bartesian Discount Codes and Deals: Up to 35% Off
item.description: Upgrade your home bar with the latest Bartesian coupon codes and discounts. Save on the Professional Cocktail Maker, enjoy subscription discounts, and get free shipping on your favorite capsules.

item.title: AT&T Promo Codes and Bundle Deals: Save $50 in April
item.description: Whether you’re looking to upgrade your internet or get the latest phone, we’ve got you covered with our selection of AT&T coupons and deals.

item.title: Petlibro Discount Codes: Save Up to 50%
item.description: Save on Petlibro essentials, including automatic feeders, water fountains, and accessories to keep cats and dogs fed, hydrated, and comfortable every day.

item.title: Top Home Chef Promo Codes for April 2026
item.description: Enjoy up to 50% off deliveries, free meals, and more with the latest Home Chef coupons.

item.title: Altra Promo Codes: Get 20% Off Plus Free Shipping
item.description: Score big savings on Altra Running shoes with up to 50% off sale styles, 20% off select models, 10% off your first order when you sign up, plus free standard delivery on every purchase.

item.title: La proposition de loi qui veut renverser le rapport de force entre IA et auteurs a été adoptée au Sénat
item.description: Honnie des développeurs d'IA, bénie des auteurs : la proposition de loi sénatoriale, qui vise à rééquilibrer les rapports de force entre sociétés d'IA et créateurs, a été adoptée à l'unanimité mercredi 8 avril au Sénat. Le texte pourrait changer le paysage actuel du secteur de l'intelligence artificielle.

item.title: This Philips air fryer is guaranteed to fix an issue in my kitchen — and it’s not the one you think
item.description: I'm not exactly in need of a new air fryer, but I'm finding it increasingly harder to resist nabbing this gorgeous Philips machine.

item.title: You, Me and Tuscany review: Halle Bailey and Regé-Jean Page deliver a radiant, feel-good rom-com
item.description: Halle Bailey and Regé-Jean Page deliver a radiant, feel-good rom-com with "You, Me & Tuscany." Review.

item.title: Hurdle hints and answers for April 9, 2026
item.description: Hints and answers to today's Hurdle all in one place.
